name: INCOMPETENT CERVIX
definition: gaping cervix usually develops during 2nd trimester / early 3rd trimester
dominant_finding: bulging of membranes through external os ← amniotic fluid within dilated endocervical
discriminating_features: dilatation of cervical canal beginning at internal os + extending toward external os:
bulging of membranes through external os ← amniotic fluid within dilated endocervical
visualization of fetal parts within dilated endocervical canal

general: dilatation of cervical canal beginning at internal os + extending toward external os:
bulging of membranes through external os ← amniotic fluid within dilated endocervical
visualization of fetal parts within dilated endocervical canal

clinical.Prognosis: 14th-18th week best time for Rx prior to significant cervical dilatation
